CONTENT.Club career: Massimo made 18 appearances for Arminia Bielefeld's U-17 team and played seven games for the first team. In May 2018, Massimo signed a contract with Bundesliga side VfB Stuttgart, but initially remained on loan at Bielefeld until 30 June 2019.On 22 July 2022, Massimo joined Académico de Viseu in Portugal on loan for the 2022–23 season.On 18 May 2024, VfB Stuttgart announced that Massimo will leave the club after this season when his contract expires.
CONTENT.External links: Roberto Massimo at WorldFootball.netRoberto Massimo at DFB (also available in German)
CONTENT.International career: Massimo was born in Ghana to a Liberian mother and an Italian father. He was raised in Germany and is a German citizen. Massimo is a youth international for the Germany U18s.

SUMMARY: Roberto Massimo (born 12 October 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a wingerand wing-back for 2. Bundesliga club Greuther Fürth. Born in Ghana, he has represented Germany at youth level.
